prompt: Create a vertical hyper-realistic cinematic soda advertisement poster for Fanta Orange in a luxury beverage commercial style. A cheerful stylish young woman sits casually in the foreground, wearing an oversized vivid orange hoodie, white shorts, and white sneakers; her dark messy hair is tied up in a loose bun, and her face is intentionally covered by a centered plain tan square censor block. She holds a large chilled orange soda bottle toward the camera with strong foreshortening, making the bottle the dominant foreground subject; the bottle is covered in condensation droplets and sparkling bubbles, with an orange label showing the Fanta-style logo, orange slice graphics, and small flavor text. The background is an extravagant fantasy orange-soda world at golden hour: huge arcing waves of glowing orange liquid splash across the sky, floating orange slices, citrus trees heavy with fruit, sparkling droplets, a small orange hot-air balloon with a soda logo, tiny carnival-like platforms, a Ferris wheel, and warm sunset clouds. Add bold white distressed uppercase advertising text on the right reading TASTE THE FUN, with smaller white subtext beneath reading MORE THAN A SODA. IT'S HAPPINESS.. Use saturated orange and gold color grading, dramatic rim light, shallow depth of field, ultra-detailed realistic skin and fabric texture, glossy bottle plastic, crisp commercial photography, energetic splash motion, premium poster composition, no extra logos beyond the soda branding, no watermark.
